data.revised_prompt:
Create one clean HD 2D game sprite animation sheet for a fantasy RPG enemy, arranged in exactly a 2x2 grid with four equal invisible cells, read left-to-right across rows. Solid flat chroma-key background only: pure #FF00FF magenta, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no borders, no visible grid lines.

Subject: a normal-style melee enemy for Samsara Ascension, a corrupted xianxia raider. Design language: dark red and iron armor plates, ragged black hair, compact heavy blade or claw weapon held close, angular hostile silhouette, clean HD hand-painted 2D fantasy RPG sprite, readable at small size, not cute, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art.

Framing: full body visible in every cell, three-quarter RPG view from slightly above, centered in each cell, same body height and same scale in all four frames, subject fills about 58-66% of each cell with generous magenta margin. Stable grounded feet anchor line. Keep the entire subject and weapon fully inside each cell; nothing may cross cell edges.

Animation: idle loop with real pose changes. Frame 1 top-left: neutral ready posture, body settled. Frame 2 top-right: visible breathing or energy inhale, shoulders/core lift slightly, a small attached aura brightens. Frame 3 bottom-left: weight shifts to the opposite side, cloth, hair, and weapon sway clearly. Frame 4 bottom-right: settle back toward the first pose, aura dims, loop returns naturally. Preserve exact same identity, silhouette family, palette, face/eyes or core face, armor marks, weapon/focus, and material language in every cell; only pose, clothing motion, limbs, hair, and small attached aura may change. No detached projectiles, no impact bursts, no large slash arcs, no long trails, no dust clouds.

Style: clean hand-painted fantasy RPG sprite sheet, crisp readable shapes, subtle painterly detail, strong silhouette, consistent lighting, suitable for a game animation atlas.
